title: Saro´s Fruit Trees
description: Adds Apple, Orange, Pear, and Gold Apple trees with unique growth stages, harvestable fruit, and juice/jam processing.
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Fruit_Trees/BH_FT_Header.webp)
![overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Fruit_Trees/BH_FT_Overview.webp)
**This Mod Adds Fruit Trees With Cool Processing**  
Hope you like it!

For wishes or bug reports, please report via our [Discord](https://discord.gg/H8a8CJe).

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Fruit_Trees/BH_FT_Content.webp)
- **Fruit Trees** 🍎🍊  
  - Apple Trees, Oranges Trees, Pear Trees and even a Gold Apple Tree (Not Overpowered).

- **Unique Growth Stages** 🌱  
  - Different stages of growth for each tree, from sapling to full-grown.

- **Custom Content** 🎨  
  - Custom sounds, models, and textures, including animated textures and 3D animations.

- **Worms and Apples** 🪱  
  - Yes, a worm factory! Worms and apples with worms are also included.

- **Multiplayer & Survival Compatible** 🌐  
  - Fully integrated into multiplayer and survival gameplay.

![support](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Fruit_Trees/BH_FT_SupportedVersions.webp)
### Currently Supported Versions ✅

- **26.1** Forge/NeoForge/Fabric
- **1.21.5** Forge
- **1.21.3** Forge
- **1.21.1** Forge
- **1.21** Forge
- **1.20.6** Forge
- **1.20.4** Forge
- **1.20.1** (Forge/Fabric/Quilt)
- **1.19.4** Forge


![tut](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Fruit_Trees/BH_FT_Tutorial.webp)
## Only in German (Outdated)

**Project Support & Usage**

**Hosting:** For the best performance, I recommend using BisectHosting linked in the banner.

**Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.
